metaTitle.description: SEO page <title> for the NFT Gallery page, shown in browser tabs and search results. Keep brand 'Namefi' untranslated.

metaDescription.description: SEO meta description for the NFT Gallery page, summarizing the curated tokenized-domain showcase. Keep brand 'Namefi' untranslated.

title.description: On-page H1 title of the NFT Gallery page.

subtitle.description: Intro paragraph beneath the NFT Gallery title describing the curated showcase of tokenized domains. Keep brand 'Namefi' untranslated; 'ICANN' and 'DNS' are technical terms to keep.

cta.description: Call-to-action line under the gallery inviting users to feature their own domain. Contains rich tags <importLink>...</importLink> (links to import an existing domain) and <registerLink>...</registerLink> (links to register a new domain); keep both tags intact and translate only the wrapped text.
